items.title: GTA Online 50% off and GTA Trilogy up to 67% off ahead of Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders next week
items.summary:
Well, it’s sort of hard to think about anything else in gaming now that Rockstar has officially confirmed Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders will go live next week. The long-awaited follow up to GTA V is finally ready for prime time, but we still don’t know the official price and you’re still going to have to wait until mid-November to play it. That said, we are celebrating today’s announcement with some GTA deals and the FREE upgrade that goes live today to enjoy in the meantime:

  • Grand Theft Auto Online PS5 $10 (Reg. $20)
  • Grand Theft Auto: The Trilogy Switch $20 (Reg. $60)
  • PS4, digital Xbox, PC GTA V upgrade to current gen FREE starting today
    • More details here

It’s official! Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders go live next week

items.title: Walmart has one of the best RTX 5070 gaming PC deals right now with Acer’s 32GB RAM Nitro 60 desktop down at $1,539
items.summary: Walmart has been dishing out some solid deals on gaming PCs lately, and we just spotted another one that gets you an Acer Nitro 60 RTX 5070 gaming desktop for $1,539 shipped. That’s $361 below its regular price and among the lowest prices we’re currently tracking for a prebuilt system equipped with NVIDIA’s RTX 5070 12GB GPU. The configuration also includes 32GB of RAM and a 2TB SSD, a combination you’ll often find fetching considerably higher elsewhere. Similarly-specced RTX 5070 desktops, in case you’re wondering, are still hovering closer to the $2,000 mark at many retailers, making this one worth a look if you’re shopping for a new gaming rig.

items.title: Rare SSD deal drops Lexar’s 2TB ES5 MagSafe drive down to its lowest since price hike at $105 off
items.summary: Amazon is offering a rather rare deal ahead of its Prime Day sale on Lexar’s 2TB ES5 MagSafe SSD at $294.99 shipped. While the drive originally launched at around $200, it jumped up to $400 earlier this year, and discounts have been few and far between since then. Today’s deal knocks $105 off the current going rate and marks the lowest price we’ve tracked since the price hike. It’s available at a pretty good price at the moment, and this is one of the better chances we’ve seen to grab it at a discount if you’ve had your eye on this compact MagSafe-compatible SSD.

Mechanism Gaming Pillow for ROG Xbox Ally X/Ally

Buy for $67.50 (Reg. $75)

Clip the on-page coupon.

What we love

This Gaming Pillow is designed to make long gaming sessions on the couch or bed with the ROG Xbox Ally X and Ally more comfortable.
